items.title: The New York Liberty and Las Vegas Aces will play in the Commissioner's Cup Championship Game on June 30.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
The New York Liberty and Las Vegas Aces will play in the Commissioner's Cup Championship Game on June 30. 

NY will host by virtue of having the better point differential in all regular season games.

Aces won the Cup in 2022. Liberty won it in 2023.

items.title: Final: Lynx 99, Sparks 83. The Sparks have not beaten Minnesota in Los Angeles since September 2019. Olivia Miles scored 31 points on 12-for-15 shooting. Sparks fall to 7-8 and get New York on Sunday. We’ll see if Kelsey Plum is back for that one.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Lynx 99, Sparks 83. The Sparks have not beaten Minnesota in Los Angeles since September 2019. Olivia Miles scored 31 points on 12-for-15 shooting. Sparks fall to 7-8 and get New York on Sunday. We’ll see if Kelsey Plum is back for that one.

items.body_excerpt: It's not a surprise that Trae Young will decline his player option for 2026-27 and seek a multiyear deal in free agency. But it would be a surprise if he doesn’t remain with the Washington Wizards. The Wizards have the clear inside track there.

items.title: Halftime: Lynx 52, Sparks 37. Olivia Miles scored 17 of her game-high 24 points in the second quarter. Miles made as many shots as the Sparks did in the frame. Rae Burrell leads the Sparks with 14 points. Sparks are shooting 43%, but have 10 turnovers.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Lynx 52, Sparks 37. Olivia Miles scored 17 of her game-high 24 points in the second quarter. Miles made as many shots as the Sparks did in the frame. Rae Burrell leads the Sparks with 14 points. Sparks are shooting 43%, but have 10 turnovers.

items.title: Random POTD Allan Ray. Bronx hooper went to Villanova from 2002-06. Good shooter but best remembered for a scary eye injury (he recovered). Undrafted but made BOS in 2006-07 &  had 6 ppg & 41 3% for a tanking team. Played in Europe from 2007-16. Now an agent.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst

items.title: Over the last 7 games, Sparks are 9th in ORTG. They were 2nd before that. Asked Lynne Roberts, who had a long answer, how they can rectify the offense: “I think we maybe put the cart before the horse a little bit in terms of adding layers before we had really mastered the simplic
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Over the last 7 games, Sparks are 9th in ORTG. They were 2nd before that. Asked Lynne Roberts, who had a long answer, how they can rectify the offense: “I think we maybe put the cart before the horse a little bit in terms of adding layers before we had really mastered the simplicity stuff.”

items.title: Wizards star Trae Young plans to decline his $48.97 million player option for the 2026–27 season to become a FA on Monday, sources. Washington remains the front runner for the four-time NBA All-Star as he loves the team and DC, but he still expects multiple team max interest.
items.author: MarcJSpears
items.body_excerpt: Wizards star Trae Young plans to decline his $48.97 million player option for the 2026–27 season to become a FA on Monday, sources. Washington remains the front runner for the four-time NBA All-Star as he loves the team and DC, but he still expects multiple team max interest.

items.title: NEW feature: Sophie Cunningham speaks her mind. Always has. That’s part of why she connects — with teammates, fans and now viewers.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
NEW feature: Sophie Cunningham speaks her mind. Always has. That’s part of why she connects — with teammates, fans and now viewers.

The Fever guard says her goal is to bring honesty, authentic stories and positivity to the broadcast space.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/sophie-cun...

media.title: Sophie Cunningham brings her voice — and positivity — to USA Sports’ WNBA coverage
media.description: The Fever guard made her debut as a USA Sports contributor and said she wants to bring honesty, authenticity and smiles to the broadcast space.
